full_text:
The sample was minced into small pieces and dissociated using Dispase, followed by Collagenase & Hyaluronidase (C&H).

Dispase dissociation media included 19.4 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 400 µl Dispase + 200 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before and after. Filtered through 70 µm cell strainer.

Further dissociated the leftover tissue pieces with 17.8 ml DMEM/F12+++, 2 ml Collagenase & Hyaluronidase, and 200 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37°C, rotating for 1 hour, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Dispase dissociated cells:

(1) RBC lysis with 3 ml for 5 min + 15 ml DMEM/F12+++. (2) RBC lysis with 2 ml for 5 min + 10 ml DMEM/F12+++. (3) RBC lysis with 5 ml for 5 min + 20 ml DMEM/F12+++. (4) RBC lysis with 5 ml for 5 min + 20 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 1 mL of DMEM/F12+++ media.

Sequentially dissociated cells: (1) RBC lysis with 3 ml for 5 min + 15 ml DMEM/F12+++. (2) RBC lysis with 2 ml for 5 min + 10 ml DMEM/F12+++. (3) RBC lysis with 5 ml for 5 min + 20 ml DMEM/F12+++.

Cell counts:

B) Biobanking

Dispase dissociated cells: 4x 15x10^6 cells

Sequentially dissociated cells: 5x 10x10^6 cells

Cells were frozen in 1mL of STEM-CellBanker.

| | Dispase | Dispase + C&H
1) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 1.27 | 19.5
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 3.49x10^5 | 16.9
 | viability [%] | 27.5 | 86.8
 | size [µm] | 22.0 | 8.3
2) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 23.4 | 16.5
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 21.5 | 14.4
 | viability [%] | 92.1 | 86.9
 | size [µm] | 8.5 | 8.9
Average | [cells/ml] | 23.4x10^6 | 18x10^6
 | total [cells] | 61.675x10^6 in 5mL | 54x10^6 in 3mL
 | viability [%] | 59.8 | 86.85
